qa_pairs.question: What was the duration of the Cedar compute cluster shutdown in January 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar compute cluster was shut down for 9 days, from January 13 to January 21, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: Why was the Cedar compute cluster shut down from January 13 to January 21, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The shutdown was in preparation for infrastructure renewal.

qa_pairs.question: What happened to jobs submitted to the Cedar cluster during the January 2025 outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Jobs submitted to the cluster would queue; those that could complete before the shutdown might run, while jobs that couldn't would remain in the queue until January 21.

qa_pairs.question: What action was required for users with important data on Cedar's /scratch filesystem during the January 2025 outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Users were advised to immediately move any important data from their /scratch filesystem to their /project, /nearline, or /home directory.

qa_pairs.question: Was Cedar Cloud affected by the January 2025 outage?
qa_pairs.answer: No, Cedar Cloud remained operational during this period.

qa_pairs.question: What was the status of the Cedar /scratch filesystem during the January 2025 infrastructure renewal preparations?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar /scratch filesystem was migrated to new storage.

qa_pairs.question: When was the Niagara cluster shut down for main panel upgrades?
qa_pairs.answer: The Niagara cluster experienced a full power shutdown from November 25 to November 26, 2024.

qa_pairs.question: What was the reason for the Niagara outage on November 25-26, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: A full power shutdown was necessary for main panel upgrades ahead of the Trillium cluster setup.

qa_pairs.question: What advice was given to users regarding job submission before the Niagara outage on November 25-26, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Users were encouraged to submit smaller, short-duration jobs to optimize idle node usage before the maintenance began.

qa_pairs.question: How did the Niagara outage on November 25-26, 2024, affect its services and scheduler?
qa_pairs.answer: All Niagara services, including the cluster and scheduler, were paused during this time, and the scheduler held jobs that could not finish before the shutdown.

qa_pairs.question: Which systems and storage were affected by the SciNet Datacenter outage on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: All systems and storage at the SciNet Datacenter, including Niagara, Mist, HPSS, Rouge, Teach, JupyterHub, and Balam, were unavailable.

qa_pairs.question: What was the purpose of the SciNet Datacenter outage on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: This outage was necessary for installing new electrical equipment (UPS) as part of a systems refresh.

qa_pairs.question: What was the impact of the November 7-8, 2024, SciNet Datacenter outage on the scheduler?
qa_pairs.answer: The scheduler paused jobs that were unable to finish before the shutdown.

qa_pairs.question: What time did the SciNet Datacenter outage occur on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: The outage was from 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET.

qa_pairs.question: What was recommended for users concerning job priority before the SciNet Datacenter outage on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Users were advised to prioritize short jobs to utilize otherwise idle nodes prior to maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: What parts of the Cedar system were affected by the outage on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Cedar compute nodes were unavailable during this period.

qa_pairs.question: Were Cedar login nodes, storage, or cloud services affected by the November 7-8, 2024, outage?
qa_pairs.answer: No, Cedar login nodes, storage, and cloud services remained operational and unaffected.

qa_pairs.question: What were the dates and times for the Cedar compute node unavailability in November 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Cedar compute nodes were unavailable from November 7, 2024, 6 a.m. PST, to November 8, 2024, 6 a.m. PST.
